description:
An ultimate internet/network control, security and statistical tool for Windows.

NetLimiter in an ultimate internet/network control, security and statistical tool for Windows.
Use it to manage bandwidth of individual applications, monitor data coming to and out of your machine in real-time, block unwanted intruders, analyze network problems and much more...
This release brings two major improvements. Since now NetLimiter allows import from other Stats databases (version 5) and broadens functionality of DNS-based rules.

New features
- Imports from NetLimiter version 5 databases are now possible. This tool is accessible from the Stats Manager.
- NetLimiter now supports filtering domains that are not automatically detected by the application. Simply create a filter for a domain and add rules to control its traffic.
Fixed bugs
- Stats data management now even more robust.
- Several minor internal fixes.
